---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Get In Touch

Trainee Accountant by day job, data analytics student by night grind! Happy to connect 
with anyone interested in finance, analytics or where the two meet. My inbox is always open through any of the channels below.

---

## {{< fa address-card >}} Contact Information

| | |
|---|---|
| {{< fa envelope >}} **Email** | [ruairi.c12@gmail.com](mailto:ruairi.c12@gmail.com) |
| {{< fa brands linkedin >}} **LinkedIn** | [linkedin.com/in/ruairi-c-02b268130](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ruairi-c-02b268130/) |
| {{< fa brands github >}} **GitHub** | [github.com/RuairiCullen](https://github.com/RuairiCullen) |
| {{< fa location-dot >}} **Location** | Castleknock, Dublin 15, Ireland |

---

## {{< fa user >}} References

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Professional and academic references are available on request. Please get in touch 
via email and I will provide full details.
:::

---

## {{< fa file-pdf >}} CV

You can download my full CV below:

[Download CV](cv/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal"}
A recruiter, fellow student, or just curious about my work? I am always open to conversations and 
I would love to hear from you. Check out my [projects](projects/index.qmd) or 
learn more [about me](about.qmd).
:::
